headline: NVR, Inc. (NVR)’s First-quarter Profit Drops
summary: NVR, Inc. (NYSE:NVR) is one of the 10 Best Housing Stocks to Buy in 2026. On April 22, 2026, Reuters reported that NVR, Inc. (NYSE:NVR) reduced profit and revenue in the first quarter of 2026 because of the rising costs and economic uncertainties that weighed on demand. Shares tumbled 6% in morning trading. The corporation […]
